description: Records the material-type qualification result for one supplier against one material type (food-agro, packing-material, or api-raw). The required certifications are driven by the QualificationMatrix for the materialType. The qualification is complete when all required certs are present and valid, the hygiene audit outcome is APPROVED or PRE_QUALIFIED, and a Quality Agreement is signed. Status gates the supplier's ONBOARDED transition for that material category (axiom A18).

fields.name: id
fields.label: Qualification ID
fields.purpose: Stable surrogate key for the qualification record; referenced by the hygiene audit, retention samples, and quality agreement.

fields.name: supplierId
fields.label: Supplier
fields.validation: must reference an existing Supplier; unique with materialType
fields.purpose: Binds the qualification record to the supplier being assessed; combined with materialType forms the natural key so each supplier has at most one qualification record per material category.

fields.name: materialType
fields.label: Material Type
fields.validation: one of the enum; determines the required certification set from QualificationMatrix
fields.purpose: The material category being qualified; maps to the QualificationMatrix row that specifies which certifications are required (e.g. food-agro requires FSMS/HACCP/ISO22000; api-raw requires GMP/FDA/USP-BP-EP-IP/COA x3/ICH/retention samples).

fields.name: supplierType
fields.label: Supplier Type
fields.validation: free text descriptor of supplier category (e.g. contract manufacturer, distributor, trader); informational, does not gate qualification
fields.purpose: Describes the supplier's operational role in the supply chain for context during qualification review; informs the depth of audit and the relevant QualificationMatrix row.

fields.name: requiredCerts
fields.label: Required Certifications
fields.validation: array of certification codes required for this materialType per QualificationMatrix; each must match a cert present in Supplier.certifications with valid (non-expired) status before qualification can reach QUALIFIED or PRE_QUALIFIED
fields.purpose: The specific certification checklist for this material-type qualification, derived from QualificationMatrix; drives the cert completeness gate that Quality reviews before approving QUALIFIED status.

fields.name: status
fields.label: Qualification Status
fields.validation: PENDING -> QUALIFIED (audit average >= 1.5 + all certs + QA agreement) | PRE_QUALIFIED (audit average 1.0 to < 1.5 + all certs + QA agreement, gated) | REJECTED (audit average < 1.0); axiom A18
fields.purpose: The outcome of the material-type qualification; QUALIFIED gates the supplier's ONBOARDED status for this material category; PRE_QUALIFIED is conditionally allowed with additional oversight; REJECTED blocks ONBOARDED for this material type.

fields.name: matrixVersion
fields.label: Matrix Version Applied
fields.validation: the version of the QualificationMatrix used when this record was assessed; for audit traceability when the matrix is updated
fields.purpose: Records which version of the qualification requirements this supplier was assessed against; essential when the matrix is updated so historical qualifications are traceable to the rules in force at the time.

invariants: A18 QUALIFIED requires all required certs valid + hygiene audit average >= 1.5 + signed QualityAgreement; PRE_QUALIFIED requires audit average 1.0 to < 1.5 + certs + agreement (gated); REJECTED for average < 1.0; api-raw also requires COA x3 + retention samples
A13 audit + SSE on every status change
